output.final_deliverable: Canberra is the capital city of Australia. Source: Australian Government – Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade (DFAT) country brief on Australia: https://www.dfat.gov.au/geo/australia/australia-country-brief
output.action_summary: Australia’s capital city is Canberra (per DFAT Australia country brief).
